ripaisc.name: RIPAISC
ripaisc.blurb: Red Iberoamericana para el Avance de la Ingeniería de Software Cuántico. CYTED-funded since Feb 2025. Coordinated from UCLM (Spain); arcs shown from regional centroid.

principia.name: Instituto Principia Roadmap
principia.blurb: Quantum technologies roadmap network coordinated by Instituto Principia (São Paulo) since 2020, connecting USP, Unicamp, UFSCar and UFRN.

miro.name: MIRO
miro.blurb: Millennium Institute for Research in Optics — multi-university quantum optics and information consortium across Chile. Arcs shown to mapped member-university groups.

unahur.name: UNAHUR Quantum Network
unahur.blurb: 3-qubit NMR system + cloud access shared across 11 Argentine universities. Arcs shown to mapped groups at member universities (UBA, UNLP, UNC).
